verbatim_text: This represents the performance that can be achieved just by the probe learning capacity alone even when the language model has no task relevant information. And then we compare this against a probe trained on a trained language model and suppose this is 70 percent accurate. By taking the difference between these two numbers we isolate the improvement attributable to the language modeling objective itself. Which would be 30 percent in this example. So we're going to be reporting these relative probe accuracies.
